title: Jensen Huang says Nvidia has received orders from China and is 'restarting our manufacturing'
summary_full: Nvidia is gearing up to sell its H200 processors to customers in China after a lengthy delay due to restrictions from both the U.S. and Chinese government.
summary_public: Nvidia is gearing up to sell its H200 processors to customers in China after a lengthy delay due to restrictions from both the U.S. and Chinese government.
